checkpoints.action: Verify tests/generated/manifest.json exists and all active tests are present and importable
Run pytest tests/generated/ and confirm skeleton tests pass (Dev filled pytest.fail() expected values)
Run Blast Radius Tool Phase 2 based on actual git diff; verify Dev declared handling for every coverage_gap and required_validation (or veto unacceptable exemptions)
Verify Canary SessionStart hook: behavioral test (not grep); confirm exec >/dev/null on success, stderr+exit 2 on failure, 4 guards (Write/Bash/git-privilege/read-size)
Output failures[].primary_cause enum (dev_error|ba_error|environment|unknown) for each QA rejection to enable score-update.sh scoring attribution
